info.name: Riot Games League of Legends API

description.content:
The Riot Games Developer API provides access to League of Legends game data including summoner profiles, champion mastery, ranked standings, match history, live spectator data, and tournament management. API keys are obtained through the Riot Developer Portal.

Contact Support:
 Name: Riot Developer Portal
